# temporal_nexus_endpoint (Data Source)

Read-only data source for an existing Temporal Nexus endpoint, looked up by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing Nexus endpoint by name.
data "temporal_nexus_endpoint" "order_processing" {
  name = "order-processing"
}

output "endpoint_id" {
  value = data.temporal_nexus_endpoint.order_processing.id
}

output "endpoint_url_prefix" {
  value = data.temporal_nexus_endpoint.order_processing.url_prefix
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Endpoint name.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Endpoint description.
- `external_target` (Attributes) External target, if the endpoint is configured with one. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--external_target))
- `id` (String) Server-generated unique endpoint ID.
- `url_prefix` (String) Server-rendered URL prefix.
- `version` (Number) Optimistic-concurrency-control version.
- `worker_target` (Attributes) Worker target, if the endpoint is configured with one. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--worker_target))

<a id="nestedatt--external_target"></a>
### Nested Schema for `external_target`

Read-Only:

- `url` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--worker_target"></a>
### Nested Schema for `worker_target`

Read-Only:

- `namespace` (String)
- `task_queue` (String)
